title: Sidebar Changes In Progress
description: Studio UI for **Sidebar Changes In Progress**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Changes In Progress**.
context: Studio UI for **Sidebar Changes In Progress**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Changes In Progress**.

rules.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data — navigation only
rules: The sidebar MUST render a list of active in-progress changes from global poll hooks. Sections MUST be enclosed in shadcn **`Card`** components. Each row MUST be implemented using a shadcn **`Button`** (variant ghost) that navigates to the change Overview — the sidebar MUST NOT expose per-row action buttons (Draft, Discard, Archive, etc.). All lifecycle actions are surfaced in the change **Overview** tab after opening the change.

rules.requirement: rows must truncate long change names
rules: Each change row MUST support text truncation ("...") when the sidebar width is constrained, using flexbox-based `min-w-0` and `truncate` rules applied to the button and its children.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors.

scenarios.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data — navigation only
scenarios.name: Sidebar lists refresh on global poll
then: AND no action buttons are rendered on sidebar rows

scenarios.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data — navigation only
scenarios.name: Open action calls read port
when: user clicks an active change row
then: port-changes-read opens the change Overview tab

scenarios.requirement: rows must truncate long change names
scenarios.name: Long change names truncate
given: a change with name exceeding sidebar width
then: AND full name is visible via native browser tooltip

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: AND editor buffer is not silently replaced
